categoryBenefits.marketing: Master the latest social media strategies and start generating real sales.
categoryBenefits.business: Develop practical skills that will help you create and grow a successful business.
categoryBenefits.design: Learn how to create visual masterpieces that will set you apart in the market.
categoryBenefits.video_photo: Perfect your video and photo production skills at a professional level.
categoryBenefits.personal_development: Build the confidence and leadership qualities that will take you to the next level.
categoryBenefits.finance: Learn how to manage your money and build financial independence.
categoryBenefits.technology: Master the technologies driving the future — from programming to AI.
categoryBenefits.health_fitness: Discover proven methods for a healthier and more energetic lifestyle.

hero.badge: The All-in-One Platform for Course Creators
hero.title: Replace 5+ Tools with One
hero.subtitle: Stop juggling Discord, Kajabi, Calendly, Skool, and Zapier. Founders Club combines community, courses, scheduling, and AI-powered student success tracking in one place.

painPoints.title: Tired of the Tool Chaos?
painPoints.subtitle: Course creators face real challenges every day

multipleTools.title: Juggling Multiple Tools
multipleTools.description: Switching between Discord, Kajabi, Calendly, and more wastes hours every week. Each tool has its own login, interface, and billing.

losingStudents.title: Losing Students to Silence
losingStudents.description: Without visibility into student progress, at-risk learners slip through the cracks. By the time you notice, they've already churned.

manualTracking.title: Manual Tracking & Admin Work
manualTracking.description: Manually tracking progress, engagement, and student health eats into your time. You should be creating, not doing admin work.

solution.title: One Platform. Everything You Need.
solution.subtitle: Founders Club replaces your entire tech stack with a unified, AI-powered solution

communityHub.title: Community Hub
communityHub.description: Built-in forums, channels, and real-time chat. Replace Discord and Skool.

courseLms.title: Course LMS
courseLms.description: Complete learning platform with modules, lessons, and progress tracking. Replace Kajabi.

events.title: Events & Scheduling
events.description: Group events and 1:1 booking built-in. Replace Calendly and Cal.com.

aiManager.title: AI Success Manager
aiManager.description: AI tracks every student, identifies at-risk learners, and suggests interventions.

features.title: Features That Scale With You
features.subtitle: Everything you need to run a successful creator business

memberManagement.title: Member Management
memberManagement.description: Organize students, track engagement, and manage access all in one place.

analytics.title: Analytics Dashboard
analytics.description: Real-time insights into course completion, engagement, and revenue.

payments.title: Payments & Subscriptions
payments.description: Stripe integration for one-time purchases and recurring memberships.

contentProtection.title: Content Protection
contentProtection.description: Secure your courses with access controls and member-only content.

fastSetup.title: Fast Setup
fastSetup.description: Launch your creator business in minutes, not weeks. No technical skills needed.

aiInsights.title: AI-Powered Insights
aiInsights.description: Let AI identify struggling students and suggest personalized interventions.

testimonials.title: Loved by Creators Worldwide
testimonials.subtitle: See what course creators are saying about Founders Club

testimonial1.quote: Founders Club saved me 15+ hours a week. No more switching between tools. Everything I need is right here, and the AI Success Manager is a game-changer.
testimonial1.name: Sarah Mitchell

testimonial2.quote: I was paying $400/month for 5 different tools. Now I pay a fraction of that and have everything in one place. My students love the integrated experience.
testimonial2.name: James Chen

testimonial3.quote: The AI Success Manager helped me reduce churn by 40%. It identifies at-risk students before they disappear. This alone paid for the platform 10x over.
testimonial3.name: Emily Rodriguez

pricing.title: Clear Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Pay for growth only when you see results.

originStory.title: We built the tool we were missing
originStory.paragraph1: As mentors and course creators, we experienced this chaos ourselves. Telegram for chat, Skool for community, Kajabi for courses, Calendly for booking... and still losing students.
originStory.paragraph2: Students dropped out in silence. We had no way to see who needed help until it was too late.
originStory.paragraph3suffix: — the only platform with a built-in AI Success Manager.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.activationAnswer: All creators pay a one-time €9.90 activation fee to set up their account. This helps ensure committed creators and covers initial setup costs.
faq.whenStartAnswer: For Pro and Scale plans, the monthly subscription fee only begins after you make your first sale. This means you can set up everything risk-free before you start earning.
faq.changePlansAnswer: Yes! Upgrades take effect immediately with prorated billing. Downgrades take effect at the end of your current billing period.
faq.paymentTitle: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.paymentAnswer: We accept all major credit cards through Stripe. Your payments are secure and you can manage your billing through the Stripe customer portal.

onboarding.authRequiredMessage: Please sign in or create an account to continue.
onboarding.creatorRequiredMessage: This onboarding is for creator accounts. If you want to become a creator, please upgrade your account.
onboarding.alreadyActivatedMessage: Your creator account is already activated. You can manage your billing in settings.
onboarding.successMessage: Your payment was successful. Redirecting to your dashboard...
onboarding.canceledMessage: No problem! You can complete the activation whenever you are ready.
onboarding.mainSubtitle: Complete a one-time activation to unlock all creator features and start building your community.

features.communitiesDesc: Build multiple communities for different topics
features.coursesDesc: Create courses with modules, lessons, and quizzes
features.paymentsDesc: Sell courses and memberships with Stripe integration
features.aiDesc: AI-powered insights and student engagement tools
features.starterDesc: 6.9% platform fee only when you make sales

faq.activationTitle: Why is there an activation fee?
faq.activationAnswer: The small activation fee helps ensure committed creators and covers initial account setup costs. It is a one-time payment, not recurring.
faq.monthlyAnswer: You start on our free Starter plan with a 6.9% fee per sale. No monthly fees until you choose to upgrade to Pro or Scale plans.
faq.upgradeAnswer: Yes! You can upgrade to Pro (3.9% fee) or Scale (1.9% fee) anytime from your billing settings. Monthly fees only start after your first sale.

plans.firstSaleNote: Monthly fee starts after your first sale

gate.lockedMessage: This feature is not available on your current plan.

billingDetails.title: Billing Details
billingDetails.upgradeImmediate: Your upgrade will take effect immediately.
billingDetails.upgradeProrated: You will be charged a prorated amount of €{{amount}} for the remainder of your current billing period.
billingDetails.firstSaleNotMade: The monthly fee of €{{amount}} will only start after you make your first sale.
billingDetails.downgradePeriodEnd: Your plan change will take effect at the end of your current billing period.
billingDetails.downgradeAccessContinues: You will continue to have access to your current plan features until then.

downgradeWarning.title: Before you downgrade
downgradeWarning.message: Make sure you are within the limits of the {{planName}} plan. If you exceed the limits, some features may become unavailable.

balance.title: Your Balance
balance.subtitle: Track your earnings and request withdrawals
balance.pendingTooltip: Funds are held for 7 days before becoming available to protect against chargebacks
balance.reservedTooltip: Rolling reserve held for 120 days to protect against chargebacks. Released gradually over time.

withdrawal.blockerConnectMessage: You need to complete Stripe Connect onboarding to receive payouts.
withdrawal.blockerNegativeMessage: Your negative balance must be cleared before you can withdraw.
withdrawal.processingInfo: Withdrawals are typically processed within 1-2 business days. The funds will be sent to your connected bank account.
withdrawal.successMessage: {{amount}} has been sent to your payout account.
withdrawal.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact support.
